summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary

Cyber Security Services (CSS) is an Ohio-based independent cybersecurity consulting firm (est. 2014) that provides penetration testing, virtual CISO, incident response, SOC, and compliance services (SOC 2, HIPAA, PCI, etc.) to U.S. organizations, with the distinction of being an original contributor to the NIST Cybersecurity Framework.
